name: Draw the Road
author: Poki
description: Draw the Road is a creative puzzle game where you draw paths to guide a car safely to the finish line. Repair broken roads by sketching smart routes and clicking tiles in the right order so falling pieces become helpful platforms. Solve clever challenges, discover the best path forward, and customize your car with fresh paint. Can you rebuild the road to victory? How do I play Draw the Road? Use your mouse to click and draw the path, as well as clicking on the correct blocks. Who created Draw the Road? Draw the Road is created by Yodco Media. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Draw the Road for free? You can play Draw the Road for free on Poki. Can I play Draw the Road on mobile devices and desktop? Draw the Road can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
